problem id: 4f80d363
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(6) AND NOT SHR(1)) XOR NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  10000101 -> 01011110
  10010010 -> 01011011
  01110111 -> 10111011
  01110010 -> 01111011
  01000100 -> 11101110
  10101001 -> 01010101
  10010000 -> 11011011
  10111010 -> 01011101
  01011000 -> 11101101

query: 11001101
predicted answer: 01101110
